S.FORM: Don Betourne kawas tay 1915, ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 2, Don Betourne, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2002) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *on ОІetourne kawas~Й• taj ****, rjax s~Й•a taj ** nqu taj *, *on ОІetourne, s~Й•quliq na pК”unro. (mД§uqil s~Й•a kawas~Й• taj ****) КҰ~КЁinkД§ulan s~Й•a knitaК” s~Й•a ОІrОІiruК” lis~Й•ts~Й• o* national ОІas~Й•ketОІall as~Й•s~Й•oКҰ~КЁiation plajers~Й•
